sheet_name: แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลพื้นชั้นล่าง, แบบขยายระบบสุขาภิบาลห้องน้ำ
view_title: แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลห้องน้ำ (ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น)

overall_dims_m.height_note: 1.80 (vertical dimension shown on left side of detail)

elements.description: Ø3/4"CW cold-water supply entering top-left of detail, routed down through the wall
Ø2 1/2"W waste pipe from lavatory/fixtures, routed to the floor-drain/cleanout cluster
Ø4"S soil pipe from water closet (WC symbol) to the main stack
Ø2"FD floor drain (two callouts of 'Ø2"FD' visible), with FCO (floor cleanout) marked adjacent to each
Ø2"V+AVC vent pipe with vent cap at bottom-left, plus a separate Ø2"V vent stub near the water closet stack

sibling_files: บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า29_floor_plan.json
warnings: This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic detail plan of underfloor bathroom piping, not on the main building grid -- grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true here (unlike the sibling main floor plan on this same page, which IS on the real structural grid).

Independent re-read (t4) agrees with t3's element list and pipe-size callouts (Ø3/4"CW, Ø2 1/2"W, Ø4"S, Ø2"FD, Ø2"V+AVC); exact fixture layout (WC/lavatory positions relative to walls) and precise routing paths between fixtures remain only partially legible at this resolution -- positions are best-effort, not measured coordinates.
No content change from t3; only wrapper-level addition is source_image. Pattern 'plan' unaffected by 2026-07-08 taxonomy update.
